$comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Data contract. ONE contract holds identity, persistence, migrations, and naming as rules. chattr persists chat/jobs/rules/sessions; legacy uses JSONL + JSON files. Rules locked only as a migrated slice demands them.
title: Data
summary: Data identity and shape: how messages/jobs/rules/sessions/agents are persisted and named, migration discipline, and identity. Legacy chattr uses JSONL message log + JSON stores; the clean repo decides the durable model per slice.
enforcedBy: schema lint / contract tests + CI — derived from these rules
openItems: Persistence model: keep JSONL/JSON stores vs adopt a DB — decide per slice.
Migration discipline (if a DB is adopted) — define and lock.
